fpsoverlay.title: Info Overlay
fpsoverlay.group.display.desc: Visibility and core settings. Changes apply instantly.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayDynamicDesc: Text that will switch with the main text.
fpsoverlay.option.advancedDynamicDesc: Text that will switch with the main text.
fpsoverlay.placeholders.description:
Available placeholders:
{fps} — FPS
{x}, {y}, {z} — Coords
{systemTime} — PC Time
{worldTime} — World Time
{ramPercent} — RAM (%)
{minFps}, {maxFps} — Min/Max FPS
{playerSpeed} — Player Speed (m/s)
fpsoverlay.preview.description: Customize your overlay to your liking!
fpsoverlay.option.fullSettings.tooltip: Open the full settings screen with text templates, colors, and appearance options.
fpsoverlay.option.isShowed.tooltip: Toggle the visibility of the primary information overlay on your screen.
fpsoverlay.option.isAdvancedShowed.toolt: Display additional technical statistics, such as RAM usage and minimum/maximum FPS.
fpsoverlay.option.isClassicStyle.tooltip: Switch to a minimalist, classic text style without the modern background box.
fpsoverlay.option.isVertical.tooltip: Arrange the overlay elements vertically in a column instead of a horizontal line.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayPosition.toolti: Choose which corner of the screen the main overlay will be anchored to.
fpsoverlay.option.colorOnThreshold.toolt: Automatically change the text color to alert you when performance drops below a certain level.
fpsoverlay.option.colorThreshold.tooltip: The target frame rate. The overlay text will turn red if your current FPS falls below this value.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayText.tooltip: Define what data is displayed. Supports placeholders like {fps}, {x}, {y}, {z}, and {ramPercent}.
fpsoverlay.option.advancedText.tooltip: Define data for the advanced widget. Use placeholders to customize the layout.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayBackgroundColor: Adjust the background color and transparency (RGBA) of the main widget container.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayTextColor.toolt: Set the default text color for the main overlay elements.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayRounding.toolti: Set the corner smoothness (border radius) for the widget's background plate.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayDynamicText.too: Enable alternating text that switches periodically to show different stats.
fpsoverlay.option.overlayDynamicInterval: The delay in seconds before the overlay cycles to the secondary dynamic text template.
